a) make a plan for <task>
b) orchestrate and launch sub-agents to execute the plan
c) validate the res…
Grok Build is still in beta for another month or so, but is already quite useful for production tasks

Its very limiting that a big set of very hard problems that we have just lying around are Erdos problems. Don’t get me wrong, they are quite cool, but we really need hard problems repositories for many fields, including areas that have less specified answers & require judges.

RT @free_ai_guides: NEWS FLASH: RL agents are the next big thing coming to AI.

They learn through trial, error, and feedback loops instead…

Xai的 CLI：Grok Build 

开启测试了 

对标 Claude Code、Codex

SuperGrok 和 X Premium+ 用户可以直接安装并授权账户即可使用，使用订阅的用量

安装：curl -fsSL https://t.co/lMklBgKIJe | bash

启动：grok

Grok Build 基本功能清单：

核心模式

Plan https://t.co/bZbibMBIPV

两种运行方式

交互式 TUI：终端里全屏、可鼠标操作
Headless 无人值守：grok -p 加指令，塞进脚本自动跑

支持切换任意自定义模型，不绑死 Grok
同款模型 grok-build-0.1 也单独开放在 API 上
macOS / Linux / Windows 都能装

详细：https://t.co/SsloyY8b95 https://t.co/GkCvMFxgqO
